form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on April 16 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Zipping Lowens beaten 16 lengths (31.36). Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Mister Anatoly at this track last start over 401m (23.00). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.

form.formComment: Lifted to win two runs back and got the cash again last start over 401m at this track (23.02,) beating Hendrix. In top form and can make it three straight.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fourth last time out over 401m at this track. Happy to risk in this.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 1.75 lengths in 22.76, beating Go Forward Meg. Last start finished 5th over 401m at this track beaten 10 lengths (23.48) behind Shake Not Stir in a Grade 5 on April 10. Well placed and among the chances here.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.37) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 2.25 lengths. Has two wins and three placings from six starts from the draw. Tough line-up and may struggle.

form.formComment: Can settle forward and she showed improvement to place in her last two runs including finished 2nd over 401m at this track beaten 4 lengths (23.16) behind Ray's Beauty in a Grade 5 on April 17.
